method: Exact UTF-8 lexical partition. Every C++ raw-string literal is identified by its delimiter; payload bodies, raw-literal framing, and all remaining source bytes form a disjoint partition.

components.component: Packed replay and coordinate payload bodies
components.interpretation: The contents of 44 raw-string blocks used by case-specialized decoders.
Opening and closing C++ raw-string delimiters, excluding identifiers and declaration syntax.
Parser/output, guarded QEM, case recognition, replay decoders, runtime cache logic, macros, identifiers, and ordinary literals outside raw payload bodies.

payload_attribution_limitation: The final source is macro-minified and several decoders share payload blocks, so a byte-exact semantic split among parser, QEM, individual cases, and cache logic would require subjective attribution. The lexical payload-versus-code partition is exact and machine-checked.
